$comment: Spec §8.1. Edit these values per project. Local overrides go in pipeline.local.json (git-ignored).

paths.$comment: scripts_dir removed — scripts moved into the plugin tree in PR2 (${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DIR}/scripts/) and PR3 replaces gh wrappers with the MCP github server.

local_defaults.$comment: Used by execute-plan when running a plan WITHOUT a GitHub story/issue (local single-machine run), to complete the impl-agent-input schema (story_number/issue_number require >=1).
